emails.subject: Re: DTE
emails.body: Sorry for the confusion, I only received Enron's Gty. to DTE, I need a copy of the new gty from DTE to ENA. Many thanks, Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490 Veronica Espinoza@ENRON 12/08/2000 02:25 PM

emails.subject: Re: DTE
emails.body: Re: DTE You can get the incoming gty copy from Leslie Hansen. We're also needing it.

emails.subject: Re: DTE
emails.body: Re: DTE Thanks for your help Veronica, Leslie does not have the new version. Can we call these guys and get a fax copy? With regards to our gty, I have prepared the amended version and it is on its way to Corp. for execution. Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490

emails.body: We actually keep all incoming collateral in a vault. Please forward that one down to me so that I can have it processed and sent to the vault. Veronica DEBRA PERLINGIERE@ECT 12/13/2000 05:23 PM
